parameters.name: userId

schema.description: User ID. Token-bearing feed URLs may also use the userId:token path segment form.

parameters.description: User ID. Token-bearing feed URLs may also use the userId:token path segment form.

parameters.name: token

schema.description: Calendar feed token for anonymous personal iCal access.

parameters.description: Calendar feed token for anonymous personal iCal access.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth access token accepted by protected REST endpoints when it carries a matching feature:read scope for reads or feature:write scope for mutations. These endpoints also accept an in-site Better Auth session cookie.

sessionCookie.name: better-auth.session_token
sessionCookie.description: Better Auth session cookie used by the web UI. Production cookies may use the __Secure- prefix.

mcpBearerAuth.description: OAuth bearer token for /api/mcp. MCP requires a bearer token with the MCP resource audience and does not accept session cookies.

calendarFeedToken.name: token
calendarFeedToken.description: Calendar feed token accepted by the personal iCal endpoint. Token-bearing feed URLs may also embed the token in the userId:token path segment.
